title: Use of English - Test 2
explanation:
Use of English - B1+ Test 2

Second mixed review at B1+ level.

questions.text: If only I [*had brought|brought|would bring] a charger with me yesterday.
The bridge, [*built|building|having build] in 1920, is still in use.
At this time tomorrow, I [*will be travelling|travel|will have travelled] to Prague.
That cannot be Maria - she [*must be|can't be|may be] in Paris this week.
questions.feedback: Negative deduction is needed, but here the correct option is can't be? fix later not chosen.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The speaker used several discourse markers to ____ his argument. | *structure | replace | arrest
A scientific ____ should be tested with evidence. | *theory | bargain | shelter
Do not jump to ____ before hearing both sides. | *conclusions | platforms | refunds
The delayed passengers asked for financial ____.  | *compensation | fashion | fitness
If he were more organised, he [*would not have missed|will not miss|does not miss] the train yesterday.
She asked me [*whether I had read|did I read|if had I read] the article.
The city is trying to reduce air [*pollution|promotion|permission].
I look forward to [*hearing|hear|heard] from you soon.
